chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: Sometimes we write code and there is an error.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: In fact, sometimes, no, there is an error in our code.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: In this case, when a programmer makes a mistake,

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: or sometimes the mistake can be caused by a server,

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: maybe we have ordered some records from the server

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: and those records could not come from the server due to server error.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: In this case, our Python program can terminate.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: We don't want our program to stop due to any error.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: That's why we do error handling in our Python program.

chunks.title: Exception Handling in Python
chunks.text: And to handle errors in Python, we use try-except.

text: Sometimes we write code and there is an error. In fact, sometimes, no, there is an error in our code. It happens often. In this case, when a programmer makes a mistake, or sometimes the mistake can be caused by a server, maybe we have ordered some records from the server and those records could not come from the server due to server error. In this case, our Python program can terminate. We don't want our program to stop due to any error. That's why we do error handling in our Python program. And to handle errors in Python, we use try-except. Try-except exception handling. This video will tell you how easy it is. Let's go to the computer screen and see how error handling is done in Python. Let's get started. So, the basic use case of exception handling is that errors will often come in your program. You will make a mistake here. Or it may be that there will be a situation like you ordered data from the server and the data that came from the server came in the wrong format or the server was not working or for any reason, that data could not be compatible. In this case, you will see an error. But if you see an error, then your program will stop. We all know this. For example, if I say a is equal to input and I say enter the number and after that I do something like this and after that, let's say I write here that multiplication table multiplication table of a or I use an f-string in this.
